summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UG University Assistant MVP. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend navigation and core features working correctly. Minor UI overlay issue with chat widget identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay blocks chat toggle button click
ui_bugs.workaround: Use 'Ask AI' button in course detail page instead

integration_issues.issue: AI responses may take longer than expected to load

passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (17/17 tests passed)
Landing page loads with hero, stats, program cards
Course catalog with years sidebar (5 years Dentistry, 4 years Pharmacy)
AI Chat widget opens and accepts messages
Error handling (404 responses for invalid IDs)
AI chat endpoint with GPT-5.2 integration
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI fix needed: Adjust z-index or positioning of chat toggle button to prevent Emergent badge overlay interference. Consider adding force=True to chat button clicks or repositioning elements.
